race.comment: SCANDALIZE (3) didn't have much go his way under the big weight last start, only seeing daylight late before charging to just miss. The rise in trip holds no fears with Holder unlikely to make the same mistake twice. ANAHORISH (12) finished full of running at Murray Bridge when putting her rivals away with ease. She'll get back from the draw and be launching late again. TALISAY (5) never came into it in Listed grade last time but was good fresh when sent forward. Reuniting with Milnes gives her every chance to bounce back. BIG BRUTE (1) had a clear class edge at CL2 level last start and gets his chance to keep the momentum going, though he's yet to strike over this trip. THERMODYNAMIC (7) bounced back strongly last time when finishing just behind SCANDALIZE and must be considered from the favourable draw.
